description: Dialogue for the Harbor Master in Larton who offers return trips

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: By the gods, you made it through alive! We get so few ships now... the ghost pirates have all but destroyed our trade.

choices.text: I need passage back to Dalhurst.
Tell me about the ghost pirates.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: Back to Dalhurst? That's 50 gold for the journey. It's risky, but Captain Mira is brave enough to make the run. What say you?

choices.text: I can't afford that right now.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: Good luck to you. Board when you're ready - Captain Mira will see you safely through... gods willing.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: Hmm, that's a problem. No coin, no passage. I'm sorry, but even we have to eat... what little there is left.

choices.text: I understand. I'll find the gold.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: Cursed things, they are. Started appearing a few months back. Ships vanish, crews turn up dead... or worse, turned into more of those undead monsters. There's a fortress out in the bay where they're based. Old Torben's seen it - talk to him by the docks if you want to know more.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: I've only seen it from a distance - an island with ruins of an old fort. They've made it their lair. Some say there's a captain leading them... a ghost captain with a cursed blade. Torben knows the exact location, if you're foolish enough to go looking.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: Ha! You've got guts. Talk to Mayor Aldric - he's been looking for someone brave enough to investigate. The whole town would be in your debt if you could end this nightmare.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: Bad? We're starving. The ghost pirates block all sea trade. The land route through Kazer-Dun is blocked by goblins laying siege to the dwarf hold. We're trapped. Half the town has fled. The other half... we're just waiting to die, honestly.

choices.text: Is there any way to help?

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: Break the blockade. Either clear out those ghost pirates, or break through the goblin siege at Kazer-Dun. Either would save us. Mayor Aldric can tell you more about the ghost pirates. The dwarves might know how to deal with the goblins.

choices.text: I'll see what I can do.

nodes.speaker: Harbor Master Giles
nodes.text: May the gods watch over you. Come back if you need passage.
